:doctype:     article

// URLS

// Formatting in GitLab
:toc:
:toc-placement: auto
:toc-title: Inhaltsverzeichnis
:icons:
:lang: en
:numbered:
:show-link-uri:

// special characters
:mdash: —
:nbh: ‑
:nbsp:
:nbzwsp: ﻿
:zwsp: ​
:thrdmrk: *

// For support tables: +supported/-unsupported character
:sup: &#43;
:uns: ‒
